items.title: Kubiak, Davis want Crosby to remain a Raider
items.description: New Raiders coach Klint Kubiak and team owner Mark Davis made it clear Tuesday that they want Maxx Crosby to remain with the Raiders.

items.title: Lakers rule out LeBron, ending All-NBA run at 21
items.description: The Lakers will be without LeBron James (foot), Luka Doncic (hamstring) and Austin Reaves (calf) for Tuesday's game against the Spurs. The missed game...

items.title: Vrabel: Pats to keep embattled Campbell at LT
items.description: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel said New England is committed to keeping Will Campbell at left tackle.
